verse.name: v1
verse.lines: To the north we cry out; To the south we will shout The enemy and his kingdom must come down To the east we profess; To the west we confess The enemy and his kingdom must come down

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For we cannot be silent We cannot sit by We must take this city For the cause of Jesus Christ

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: We are bold; We are strong We are ready to march on Through Christ We will take this city :/

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Where sin abounds; His grace is greater Where the enemy reigns He will give us victory
